mapper.select:
SELECT sp.id, sp.customer_id, sp.service_id, sp.purchase_date, sp.status, sp.create_time, sp.update_time, c.name AS customer_name, cs.service_name AS service_name FROM service_purchase sp LEFT JOIN customer c ON sp.customer_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN care_service cs ON sp.service_id = cs.id AND cs.deleted = 0 WHERE sp.deleted = 0
AND (c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR cs.service_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY sp.create_time DESC
